touches.ai_summary: Cold call to Tyler Cooper at PivotLink. Rep introduced AskElephant as a pipeline visibility solution. Tyler expressed interest in improving forecasting accuracy and mentioned current reliance on manual spreadsheets. Agreed to follow-up email with more details.

questions_asked.question: How are you currently tracking pipeline visibility across your sales team?
questions_asked.answer: We're mostly using spreadsheets and manual reports. It's time-consuming and often out of date.

questions_asked.question: Does your platform integrate with Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native Salesforce integration with real-time sync.

next_steps: Rep to send follow-up email with product overview and case studies
Tyler to review materials and identify key stakeholders

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with product overview, EdTech customer case studies, and pricing framework. Tyler responded asking about implementation timeline and whether the platform could support their 10-person go-to-market team.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline for a company our size?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks from kickoff to full deployment, including training.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week
Tyler to prepare current pipeline data for review

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming discovery call scheduled. Rep shared pre-call questionnaire and requested access to sample pipeline reports to prepare tailored recommendations. Tyler confirmed availability and shared high-level team structure.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for Thursday 2pm ET
Tyler to send current reporting samples by Wednesday

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Tyler Cooper. Discussed current pain points: lack of real-time pipeline visibility, manual forecasting process taking 8+ hours weekly, and difficulty identifying at-risk deals. Tyler explained their team structure (Sales Manager, RevOps Analyst, CS Director) and mentioned budget approval process requires COO sign-off. Identified unlimited automation tier as key requirement for workflow customization.

questions_asked.question: What's your biggest challenge with pipeline visibility right now?
questions_asked.answer: We can't see deal health in real-time. By the time we identify risks, it's often too late to course-correct.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Our COO Zoey Davis oversees all revenue operations. Our RevOps Analyst Taylor and Sales Manager Aiden would be end users.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform track competitor mentions and deal risks automatically?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, our AI analyzes call transcripts and emails to flag competitors, budget concerns, and timing risks automatically.

objections: We've looked at tools before that required too much manual data entry. Need something that automates insights.
next_steps: Rep to prepare customized demo focusing on automation and risk detection
Tyler to introduce Zoey, Taylor, and Aiden for next meeting
Schedule proposal call within 2 weeks

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email after discovery call with customized proposal draft. Outlined recommended 10-seat unlimited automation plan at $8,000 ACV. Included ROI calculator showing estimated 12-hour weekly time savings. Tyler responded positively and requested to move proposal call earlier in the week due to end-of-quarter budget planning.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the seat count if we want to expand mid-year?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, you can add seats anytime with pro-rated billing. Many customers start with core team and expand.

next_steps: Proposal call rescheduled to earlier date
Rep to prepare detailed implementation plan

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call rescheduled from original time. Tyler mentioned scheduling conflict with internal budget meeting. Confirmed new time for later in the week to include full stakeholder group.
next_steps: Rescheduled proposal call to include Zoey, Taylor, and Aiden
Tyler to confirm attendees by end of day

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Zoey Davis (COO) and Tyler Cooper. Zoey asked detailed questions about ROI, data security, and contract terms. Discussed budget constraints related to recent EdTech market challenges. Zoey expressed concern about initial pricing and requested discount to fit Q2 budget. Rep offered 28.7% discount to close within quarter. Zoey indicated need for one more internal review meeting before final decision.

questions_asked.question: What's your customer retention rate and average contract renewal percentage?
questions_asked.answer: 98% customer retention with 94% of customers renewing at higher tier or seat count.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle data security and compliance for EdTech companies?
questions_asked.answer: We're SOC 2 Type II certified with GDPR compliance. All data encrypted at rest and in transit.

questions_asked.question: What budget range were you planning for this type of solution?
questions_asked.answer: We're working with tighter budgets this quarter. The original price point is above what we allocated.

objections: Pricing is higher than budgeted for Q2. Need to see if we can make the numbers work.
next_steps: Rep to send revised proposal with 28.7% discount
Zoey to review with finance team
Schedule follow-up negotiation call within 3 days

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation meeting with Zoey Davis. Reviewed discounted proposal and contract terms. Zoey asked about payment terms flexibility and contract length options. Discussed annual vs. multi-year pricing. Zoey mentioned needing to balance this investment with other Q2 tools already committed. Asked about reducing seat count to lower cost. Rep explained value loss with reduced seats given team structure. Zoey requested one more internal meeting to finalize.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We can accommodate quarterly billing with a 5% processing fee, or keep annual for the discounted rate.

questions_asked.question: What if we started with 7 seats instead of 10?
questions_asked.answer: That would reduce coverage for your full GTM team. Based on discovery, all 10 roles would benefit from access.

questions_asked.question: Is there anything else blocking a decision besides budget?
questions_asked.answer: No, the solution fits our needs. It's just about making the numbers work with our other commitments.

objections: We have other tool commitments this quarter that are squeezing budget.
next_steps: Zoey to meet internally with finance and Tyler
Decision expected by end of week
Rep to remain available for questions

touches.ai_summary: Final negotiation meeting with Zoey Davis. Confirmed decision to move forward with 10-seat unlimited automation plan at discounted price with annual payment. Zoey approved contract pending legal review of data security terms. Discussed implementation kickoff timeline for early next month. Zoey requested Tyler as primary implementation contact. Agreed on 2-week legal review period before contract signature.

questions_asked.question: Can we include a 30-day opt-out clause in case implementation doesn't go smoothly?
questions_asked.answer: We can include a 30-day satisfaction guarantee with full refund if you're not seeing value.

questions_asked.question: When would you want to start implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally first week of next month, once legal completes their review.

next_steps: Send contract to legal for data security review
Legal review expected within 2 weeks
Plan implementation kickoff for early next month with Tyler as lead
